raw_payload.subject: Quick connect?
raw_payload.body:
Hi Sam,

Hope you're doing well. I came across IFG through a colleague and wanted to see if there might be a good time for a quick chat in the coming weeks. Always interesting to swap notes with folks in the M&A advisory space.

Let me know what works.

Best,
Marcus
Acme Wealth Partners
raw_payload.thread_summary: First-touch email from a wealth manager. No prior history. No specific deal or client mentioned.
